description: VR rehabilitation for left homonymous hemianopia with EEG neurofeedback

wiki.notes: Karpathy ingest pattern — compiled from sessions, research docs, scripts. Load index.md first, pull pages on-demand. 2026-05-14 research audit added 20+ verified citations + 3 citation corrections. 2026-05-16 Phase 1 scaffold session updated unity-architecture, rehabilitation-roadmap, audiovisual-training-protocol, hardware-setup. 2026-05-26 research-ops sprint added source queue, YouTube/X validation ladder, sprint reports, QEEG/tPBM watchlist, medication doctor brief, Obsidian HTML wrap-up, and Dr. Jacquemin NegletFix doctor brief with mobile HTML/PDF copies. 2026-05-30 guided Quest pilot session updated audiovisual-training-protocol, unity-architecture, hardware-setup, rehabilitation-roadmap, and index module readiness after on-headset AV validation. 2026-05-31 added sparse right-control trial documentation, first dose ramp decision, PlayMode validation, rebuilt Session1Pilot APK, passed Quest 2 5-minute, 8-minute, and 12-minute control-ramp validations, then generated the first GSAP-enhanced HTML evidence report at `reports/rehab-dose-ramp-2026-05-31.html` and set the next build target to a separate quick field-mapping calibration scene. 2026-06-03 adopted the portable Codex session ritual locally: `AGENTS.md` is now the canonical project contract, `CLAUDE.md` defers to it, `.claude/commands` are trackable command shorthands, and the dirty-tree start/end gate is explicit for NegletFix. 2026-06-11 added a ClinicalTrials.gov/PubMed-backed clinical-trials watchlist for AV+tDCS, AV multisensory, visual restoration, VR cross-modal, and neuromodulation leads; key correction: NCT04963075 is completed with posted results, NCT05894434 is not yet recruiting, and NCT06116760 is the completed exact chronic HVFD AV+tDCS adjunct lead. A static research monitor at `docs/research/research-monitor-2026-06-11.html` now shows the protocol verdict, clinical-trial lanes, YouTube/X/LinkedIn intake role, and monthly monitor checklist. 2026-06-12 added NeurIPS 2025 as an EEG-AI methods lane: source rows NP-001..NP-009 cover BrainBodyFM, EEG Foundation Challenge, REVE, LUNA/BioFoundation, BrainOmni, NeurIPT, CSBrain, EEG-Bench, and the EEG-FM critical review. LuMamba/BioFoundation remains LI-001. The whole lane is future signal-analysis infrastructure only, not AV protocol or Muse TP10 neurofeedback evidence.

contrast-sensitivity-test.notes: Hemifield positioning fixed. First baseline recorded 2025-12-15. LCD-vs-printed Zeri 2018 caveat added to wiki 2026-05-14: results valid for within-instrument tracking only.

eeg-integration.notes: Muse headband integration via Mind Monitor OSC - decoupled from v1 critical path. RewardController.RewardMode.OpenLoop is default; EegGated reserved for v2 after Muse signal-quality validation per Treves 2025 JMIR meta-analysis. NeurIPS 2025 EEG-AI methods lane is tracked through LI-001 and NP-001..NP-009 as future signal-analysis infrastructure only; current published validation is mostly high-density or clinical/research EEG, not Muse TP10.

audiovisual-training.notes: Phase 1 scaffold complete 2026-05-16 (commits ecf327f + 7ea389c + 24a3075 on main). Paradigm B (congruent-pair), Alharshan 2026 dose (30 min × 5×/week × 6 weeks = 15hr). Headless PlayMode smoke test passed 2026-05-30: shortened session completed and trial CSV opened/closed after fixing trialLogger dependency initialization. Quest/InputSystem response binding added 2026-05-30; strengthened smoke test simulates Space via Unity.InputSystem.TestFramework and verifies at least one hit/reward plus hit CSV columns. Manual smoke scene `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingManualSmoke.unity` generated and placed first in Build Settings. Quest manual smoke passed 2026-05-30 on Quest 2 after adding UnityEngine.XR fallback polling: log showed `Oculus Touch Controller OpenXR/triggerButton`, reward events fired, pulled CSV `SmokeResults/av_training_2026-05-30_14-23-19.csv` with 44 rows / 42 hits. Follow-up guard added so in-flight trials cannot create extra logs after training ends; Android smoke APK rebuilt successfully at `Unity/NeglectFix/Builds/AVTrainingManualSmoke.apk`. Generated fallback visual stimulus upgraded from sphere to flat contrast-controlled disk/Gabor quad on 2026-05-30. `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.unity` added as a short 30s baseline + 5min training + 30s cooldown pilot scene. Quest Session 1 pilot passed on-device 2026-05-30: `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` installed/launched on Quest 2, right trigger responses registered, training ended at 136 trials / 135 hits, cooldown completed, session log stopped at 3233 samples, and trial CSV closed cleanly at `SmokeResults/Pilot/av_training_2026-05-30_17-09-55.csv`. Ready prompt/countdown added 2026-05-30: TaskManager now supports a pre-baseline Ready phase; AudioVisualTraining shows a world-space headset prompt, waits for trigger/Space confirmation, then runs a countdown before baseline/data collection starts. PlayMode smoke passed and `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` rebuilt successfully with the prompt. UX follow-up: prompt worked in headset, but 5s countdown + 6min pilot was too long for non-result validation; Session 1 countdown reduced to 2s and `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingQuickReadyCheck.unity` / `Builds/AVTrainingQuickReadyCheck.apk` added for ~15s prompt/controller checks. Quick Ready Check passed on Quest 2: trigger at 17:49:09, Ready complete at 17:49:10, training began at 17:49:12, session ended at 17:49:24 with 9 trials / 9 hits; Eric confirmed the shorter timing felt better. Completion message added 2026-05-30: after cooldown/log shutdown the headset shows `SESSION COMPLETE` and `You can remove the headset now.` PlayMode smoke now asserts this message and passed; `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` rebuilt successfully with the finish message. Left-field visibility fix completed 2026-05-30: Quick Ready Check now resets saved smoke state on startup, uses Eric baseline left=0/right=2.25, clamps validation contrast high, uses 8° markers, shows a visible 2s CALIBRATING phase, and starts at left -5°/-8° instead of stale right-field 45°/55°. Quest quick check passed at 22:03 with proximity override: 9/9 hits, all left hemifield, avg RT 435ms, logs pulled to `SmokeResults/QuickReadyCheckLatest/`. Rebuilt full `Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` with the same left-field/calibration fixes for the next longer headset validation. Controlled background fix added 2026-05-30 after Eric saw Quest camera/passthrough behind the app: AudioVisualTraining now creates an opaque camera-locked gray backdrop behind prompts/stimuli, prompt panel alpha increased, QuickReadyCheck and Session1Pilot APKs rebuilt successfully with serialized backdrop settings. Unity CLI PlayMode rerun exited cleanly but did not emit XML, so fresh PlayMode verification for this specific change remains pending. Quest Quick Ready Check after controlled backdrop fix completed at 22:41 with 9/9 hits, all left hemifield, avg RT ~389ms; logs pulled to SmokeResults/QuickReadyCheckOpaque. Eric confirmed after the 22:41 Quick Ready Check that the controlled background was gray in-headset and markers were visible; this validates the passthrough visibility fix subjectively and objectively. Guided pilot flow added 2026-05-30: AV training now shows a small center fixation cross, explicit instruction that this is rehab training rather than a contrast test, a short unlogged practice block before recorded trials, and keeps practice out of the CSV/staircase. Session1Pilot preset shortened to 5s calibration + 15s practice + 120s recorded block + 5s cooldown for flow validation. PlayMode smoke passed at `SmokeResults/playmode-av-guided-pilot-results.xml`; Session1Pilot and QuickReadyCheck APKs rebuilt successfully. Updated Session1Pilot APK was installed and completed on Quest 2 at 23:27 local time: 45 recorded trials, 33 hits (73.3%), all left hemifield, avg hit RT ~475ms, trial CSV `SmokeResults/GuidedPilot/av_training_2026-05-30_23-25-27.csv`, session CSV `SmokeResults/GuidedPilot/session_2026-05-30_23-24-58.csv`; app force-stopped afterward. Eric said the guided flow is good and the cross helped him stay anchored, but the experience was emotionally heavy because audio confirmed unseen left markers. 2026-05-31: sparse intact/right-control trials implemented and separately logged (`trial_type`, `is_control_trial`, `counts_for_rehab_dose`); controls do not update the staircase. Session1Pilot regenerated as a 5-minute recorded ramp with controls; QuickReadyCheck regenerated left-only. PlayMode smoke passed at `Unity/NeglectFix/SmokeResults/playmode-right-control-ramp-results.xml`, `Unity/NeglectFix/Builds/AVTrainingSession1Pilot.apk` rebuilt successfully, and Quest 2 control-ramp run passed: 110 recorded trials, 96 left rehab-dose trials, 14 right-control trials, rehab 53/96 hits, controls 14/14 hits, final staircase 0.15 LogCS; CSVs pulled to `Unity/NeglectFix/SmokeResults/ControlRamp/`. Session1Pilot then regenerated as an 8-minute recorded ramp and rebuilt/installed over Wi-Fi ADB at `10.0.0.136:5555`; Quest 2 ramp passed with 173 recorded trials, 157 left rehab-dose trials, 16 right-control trials, rehab 75/157 hits, controls 16/16 hits, final staircase 0.30 LogCS, 4570 session samples, and CSVs pulled to `Unity/NeglectFix/SmokeResults/Ramp8/`. A short Quest system/passthrough focus hiccup occurred during startup, then the app resumed and completed cleanly. Session1Pilot then regenerated as a 12-minute recorded ramp and rebuilt/installed over Wi-Fi ADB; Quest 2 ramp passed with 255 recorded trials, 233 left rehab-dose trials, 22 right-control trials, rehab 114/233 hits, controls 22/22 hits, final staircase 0.15 LogCS, 6725 session samples, no focus loss/runtime errors, and CSVs pulled to `Unity/NeglectFix/SmokeResults/Ramp12/`.

quest-dev-mode.notes: Quest 2 paired to Eric's Meta account 2026-05-16. April 27 blocker resolved: factory reset + re-pair (not org-membership invite as previously theorized). adb authorized, serial 1WMHH831TR1047, Android 14. USB ADB became intermittent again on 2026-05-30; raw `adb connect 10.0.0.136:5555` initially returned connection refused and `adb mdns services` found no wireless debugging services. Added `scripts/quest-adb.sh` helper to switch to/cache Wi-Fi ADB after a USB connection. MQDH restored USB detection; `scripts/quest-adb.sh enable-wifi` succeeded and Wi-Fi ADB is now cached at `10.0.0.136:5555`. The 2026-05-31 8-minute ramp was installed/launched and log-pulled over Wi-Fi ADB successfully, so the USB cable is no longer needed once Wi-Fi ADB is connected. Use `scripts/quest-adb.sh install-run` / `logs` for future loops. For off-face development, the Quest may enter `HEADSET_UNMOUNTED` and sleep; `adb shell am broadcast -a com.oculus.vrpowermanager.prox_close` worked on 2026-05-30 and persists until headset reboot.

xr-plugin-management.notes: OpenXR + Meta Quest Support + Oculus Touch profile configured 2026-05-16. SSAO renderer feature disabled 2026-05-30 as Quest performance/polish cleanup.

baseline_results.notes: First validated measurement after fixing hemifield bug. LogCS values valid for within-instrument tracking only (Zeri 2018 LCD caveat). Expected outcome ranges revised per Yang/Cavanaugh/Saionz 2023: ~50-60% response rate at trained locations, blind-field CS stays ~4x lower than intact even with training.

next_actions: Retune field-guided rehab before the next dose: do not continue with -5 degrees alone; mix -5 with a harder boundary target such as -8 degrees
Add catch/probe trials so audio-guided prediction can be separated from true visual confirmation
Cap or redesign the AV contrast staircase so high hit rate at an easy/cued location cannot run away to meaningless LogCS values
Keep field mapping / assessment separate from rehab, and do not interpret the 2026-06-11 -5 degree hit rate as clinical recovery
Use the 2026-06-11 subjective fatigue report as a dose signal; do not stack another run after an exhausting 12.5-minute session
Generalize `scripts/generate-rehab-report.js` from the first 2026-05-31 dose-ramp report into a reusable report command for future session CSV pairs, including field-guided runs
Quest 3 acquisition when budget allows (used via Back Market ~€350-450)

Refresh the clinical-trials watchlist and static HTML research monitor monthly or after major PubMed/ClinicalTrials.gov changes; create a recurring automation only after the CSV-to-HTML generation path is stable
Track NeurIPS 2025 EEG-AI methods lane through LI-001 and NP-001..NP-009; revisit only after real EEG signal-quality data exists or a higher-density EEG/offline analytics track is added
